name: The Outpost
tagline: A high-desert outpost built for those who like their sunsets slow.
intro: Tucked into the quiet edge of Yucca Valley, The Outpost is a tiny home that earns its name — remote enough to feel like an escape, appointed enough to feel like a splurge.

Step outside to your own saltwater pool, steaming hot tub, cedar sauna, and a dusty mini-golf green that rivals any in the county. Nights end around the firepit under an impossibly wide sky. Come in, cowboy.

name: The Dojo
tagline: Level up. Zone out. The desert has never been this legendary.
intro: The Dojo doesn't take itself too seriously — and that's exactly the point. A bold anime mural commands the exterior, shelves of collectibles line the walls inside, and a full gaming setup means the fun doesn't stop when the sun goes down.
And yet: same serene Yucca Valley setting as always. Private saltwater pool, hot tub, sauna, mini-golf, and Joshua trees just outside the fence. Earn your rest. Then geek out.

name: The Rain House
tagline: Your own wide-open slice of the high desert.
intro: On a sweeping lot in Joshua Tree, The Rain House is made for gathering. Rally on your private pickleball court, roll a round of bocce, then cool off in the saltwater pool or sink into the jacuzzi as the sun drops behind the mountains.
Two king bedrooms, a fully fenced yard, hammocks, a firepit, and panoramic desert views — all just minutes from the park gate.

name: The Night House
bedsLabel: 2 King + Queen air bed · Dome sleeps 2 more
intro: The Night House earns its name after dark — a private bubble dome with a queen bed, where the Milky Way is your ceiling.

Below it sits a modern desert home with a saltwater pool, jacuzzi, pickleball and bocce courts, and a firepit built for long desert nights. Two king bedrooms inside, room for the whole crew, and some of the darkest skies in California overhead.
